title: Bexla's Reimagined tools
description: features new textures for your tools (and Weapons)
body:
![reimagined tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9d0600e4ca72ef86fa88173413eae5a55ee76dd.png)

Bexla's Reimagined Tools features new textures for your tools (and Weapons), giving a fresh and high quality look to your tools.

---
The currently replaced tools are Wood (+2.0), Stone, Gold, Iron, Diamond and Netherite tools. Bow and Crossbow, including arrows have been replaced too (+4.0).  Advanced Netherite Mod and Elementus Mod have received a change of textures for compatibility (+2.1).
Tools like shears and others aren't going to be replaced for now.

---
 
I'm not going to update this texture pack very often, since im going to focus on my other projects, such as Enhanced Weaponry
